awards.title: Men's Wildcard
awards.subtitle: Biggest swing between workouts
awards.name: Yeh Chih Sheng
awards.detail: Range: 43 percentile points between best and worst

awards.detail: Volatility: 0.0 — nearly the same percentile every week

wrapped.tagline: Signed up, showed up, and finished all three workouts. That puts them ahead of most.
